title: Black Signs
description: Makes Dark Oak signs unique by making their texture entirely black!
body:
# Black Signs

So are you looking for a mod/texture pack that has completely black signs for something like a Variable Message Sign like this?

(image here please)

Well you'll need [Big Sign Writer](https://modrinth.com/mod/bigsignwriter) for that big text **_BUT_** the black background? All me.

## FAQ
Q: What versions are supported right now?

A: 1.21.4 to 1.21.8 but for any other versions, you'll just have to ask about it in this [GitHub discussions page](https://github.com/therealzakie/Black-Signs/discussions/categories/new-version-ideas).

Q: WHY ISN'T MY SIGN TEXT SHOWING UP AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

A: First don't have a heart attack and just simply paint your sign a different colour other than black.

Q: Are hanging signs affected?

A: No.
